hardware: c8a.4xlarge (AMD Zen5 EPYC 9R45, 16 vCPU) spot, us-east-2
dataset: Snowflake arctic-embed-m-v1.5 (MSMARCO v2.1, precomputed, 10M of 71M), Matryoshka-truncated 768->256 then L2-normalized
config: 1-bit binary funnel (sign bit, rotation x2 + residual, tile=8) + exact f32 rerank
note: Same box family/size as 065 (1M OpenAI-256), so QPS IS directly comparable across the two entries. Codes = 320 MB >> LLC, but the scan stays COMPUTE-bound (see 068: marginal ns/code flat 16MB->320MB, tiling gains nothing); the QPS drop vs 1M is linear compute scaling, not a bandwidth wall.
